# Accounting Archetype Mapper — Enforcement Rules

- ALWAYS run the fit test before mapping.
- DO NOT map a domain that fails the fit test.
- ALWAYS ask clarifying questions before Step 3 when business-impacting gaps exist.
- ALWAYS include "To zależy / It depends" as an explicit option.
- NEVER silently assume a business policy.
- NEVER skip the Unmapped Concepts section.
